segments.content:
Last updated in August 2025

# Weiwei Bei (BEI Weiwei)

Singapore | weiweibei@gmail.com | +65 8123 4567 | Singaporean | Mandarin & English

## Profile
Singaporean self-media creator and M.Sc. student at NTU (Communication/Media). Strong in visual storytelling, short-form video, and audience insights. Undergraduate at CUHK with a one-semester exchange at the University of Melbourne. Enjoys tennis; member of Lowlands Tennis and Social Club.

## Education

**MSc (Communication)** | Nanyang Technological University (NTU), Singapore | Aug 2024 - Present
*   **Trimester 1:** Joined NTU Student Union Executive Committee; handled logistics & venue booking for student events.
*   **Trimester 2:** Approved short Leave of Absence to undertake a full-time internship at Grant Thornton Singapore (one trimester + winter break).
*   **Trimester 3:** Currently commencing courses; focus on platform communication, audience analytics, and visual storytelling.
*   **Coursework (selected):** Media Analytics, Visual Communication, Advanced Video Editing, Strategic Communication.

**BA (Journalism & Communication)** | The Chinese University of Hong Kong (CUHK), Hong Kong | Sep 2020 - Jun 2024
*   **Exchange:** University of Melbourne, Australia – one semester in Year 3.
*   **Scholarship:** The S.L. Pao Education Foundation Scholarship (2024/25).
*   **Activities:** Campus media reporting & hosting; photography projects across Hong Kong districts.

## Experience

**Grant Thornton Singapore LLP - Intern (full-time during LoA)** | Singapore | Jan 2025 - Apr 2025 & Summer 2025
*   Assisted engagement teams with working papers, sampling, and vouching; prepared schedules in Excel and reconciled variances.
*   Supported client meetings: took minutes, tracked deliverables, and coordinated document requests; improved turnaround time for evidence collection.
*   Co-drafted process notes for onboarding interns; standardized file naming and checklist use.

**Self-Media Content Creator - Photography & Lifestyle** | Singapore / Hong Kong | Dec 2021 - Present
*   Produced 300+ photo/video posts across platforms; cumulative ~6M views; average engagement ~12%.
*   Planned shoots, color graded in Lightroom/Photoshop; edited in Premiere Pro/Final Cut; maintained weekly cadence.
*   Collaborated with travel/education/consumer brands; delivered briefs, content calendars, and post-campaign analytics.

**NTU Student Union – Executive Committee (Logistics)** | Singapore | Aug 2024 - Nov 2024
*   Managed venue booking, vendor coordination, and on-site logistics for student events (50-300 attendees).
*   Built reusable checklists for equipment allocation & safety; reduced setup time.

Weiwei Bei - Page 1 of 2

by ~20%.

## Selected Projects

**"Crossroads" Short Video Series** (2024)
*   Storytelling on study-abroad and cultural adaptation; scripted, shot, and edited 10 episodes; ~200k total views.

**City Lines - Photo Essay (Hong Kong & Melbourne)** (2023)
*   Street/commuter photography; campus showcase at CUHK; explored color theory and composition under varying light.

## Awards & Certifications

The S.L. Pao Education Foundation Scholarship (2024/25) — CUHK | Putonghua Proficiency Level 1-B | Dean's List

## Skills & Tools

**Editing/Design:** Adobe Lightroom, Photoshop, Premiere Pro, After Effects; Final Cut Pro; DaVinci Resolve (basic); Audition; InDesign.
**Analytics/Workflow:** Social metrics tracking, UTM tagging, spreadsheet dashboards, basic Python/CSV processing.
**Languages:** Mandarin (native), English (professional working proficiency), Cantonese (conversational).

## Activities & Interests

**Lowlands Tennis and Social Club** (Member) — Eastcote, Middlesex HA5 1TU; lowlandsclub.com. Social & doubles sessions; occasional friendly fixtures.
**Interests:** Tennis; Street & Portrait Photography; Travel journaling; Event hosting.
